title: oplukion horridum
intro: Oplukion horridum, a lesser-known plant species, is a type of succulent native to the arid regions of Africa. It possesses medicinal properties that have been used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, wounds, and fever. The health benefits of Oplukion horridum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Oplukion horridum can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", oplukion horridum (also known as Opuntia powder) may help lower the levels of TC, LDL-C, AI, and TG in hyperlipemia wistar rats and reduce the level of MDA while increasing SOD activities, which could contribute to its potential benefits in regulating blood lipids.
